channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: GOP Strategist Criticizes Jay Clayton's Confirmation Hearing Performance and Preparedness
item.description: Jay Clayton, President Donald Trump's nominee to serve as Director of National Intelligence, faced criticism following his Senate Intelligence Committee confirmation hearing after struggling to answer...

item.title: FCC Chair's Conflict of Interest in Media Merger Raises Ethical Concerns
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) faces scrutiny over potential conflicts of interest involving its chair, Ajit Pai, amid a high-profile media merger between Paramount and Skydance Media. Th...

item.title: Gen Z Resists AI Adoption Amid Generational Divide in Tech Use
item.description: The article explores the generational divide in attitudes toward artificial intelligence (AI), highlighting how Gen Z is pushing back against its adoption. While older generations like baby boomers vi...

item.title: PEI Liberal leader steps down after by-election defeat
item.description: Prince Edward Island Liberal leader Robert Mitchell has resigned following his party's second consecutive by-election loss. The decision comes after Mitchell placed second in the Cornwall-Meadowbank r...

item.title: NAACAM Calls for 60% Local Content in South African Automotive Manufacturing to Boost Economy
item.description: The National Association of Automotive Component and Allied Manufacturers (NAACAM) is pushing for the South African government to mandate a 60% local content requirement in automotive manufacturing to...

item.title: Delhi court allows Umar Khalid to continue two supervised weekly video meetings with his family
item.description: A Delhi court has allowed activist Umar Khalid to continue having two supervised video meetings, or e-mulakats, with his family every week while he remains in judicial custody. The order was passed by...

item.title: Trump claims Iran freed US citizen amid escalating tensions with Israel and Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that Iran had released a U.S. citizen, whom he claimed was wrongfully detained in December 2024, as a 'gesture of goodwill.' This declaration came amid heightened geop...

item.title: Argentina Overcomes England to Face Spain in World Cup Final
item.description: Argentina made history by coming back from a goal down to defeat England and secure their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final against Spain. The match, held on July 15, 2026, saw England take an ea...

item.title: B.C. Boy's Family Urges Province to Fund International Treatment for Rare Condition
item.description: The family of a nine-year-old boy in British Columbia with a rare and life-threatening brain condition is appealing to the provincial government to fund international treatment. Natasha Hepburn’s son,...

item.title: Investigation into Scientist’s Murder Involves Partner and Sibling
item.description: The Philippine Star reports that the partner and sibling of American marine biologist Kent Edward Carpenter have been identified as persons of interest in his murder last Sunday at his home in Sibulan...

item.title: Pretoria court sentences man to 30 years for violent robberies targeting e-hailing drivers
item.description: A 39-year-old man from Eersterust, Kamar Davids, has been sentenced to 30 years in prison after being convicted of two violent robberies targeting e-hailing drivers in Pretoria. The Pretoria magistrat...

item.title: Snøhetta's Roosevelt Library Blends Seamlessly with the Natural Landscape
item.description: Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library, designed by Snøhetta, is a 95,000-square-foot structure integrated into the North Dakota Badlands. The building's design mimics natural formations, with a gree...

item.title: Greylock's Strategic Fund Capping at $1.5B to Focus on Early-Stage Investments
item.description: Greylock Ventures, a prestigious Silicon Valley venture firm, has raised a $1.5 billion 18th fund, intentionally capping the size to maintain a focused approach. Despite the potential to raise signifi...

item.title: Physiotherapist Mary Habila's Death Under Investigation After Being Found Dead At Minister's Residence
item.description: The family of 26-year-old physiotherapist Mary Habila has announced burial arrangements for the young professional who was found dead under controversial circumstances at Nigeria's Minister of Works, ...

item.title: Senate Calls for Immediate Security Measures After Killings in Benue Communities

item.title: Trump administration faces backlash over ICE fatalities amid political tensions
item.description: Tom Homan, the US border czar under President Donald Trump, has warned of escalating violence at the US-Mexico border unless Democratic lawmakers cease criticizing Immigration and Customs Enforcement ...

item.title: Argentina advances to World Cup final after thrilling 2-1 victory over England
item.description: Argentina secured their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final with a dramatic 2-1 victory over England in a tightly contested semi-final at the Atlanta Stadium. The match, which saw England take an e...

item.title: Property Market Outlook: Experts Predict Value Drops and Advise Buyers to Act Now
item.description: The article discusses current trends in Australia's property market, highlighting expert predictions that 78% of professionals expect residential property values to decline due to legislative reforms ...
